creator: w.schwarzenfeld@utanet.at
text:
Further with GEODB=on
=> webalizer-geodb-20170201.tgz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch ftp://ftp.mrunix.net/pub/webalizer/geodb/webalizer-geodb-20170201.tgz
fetch: ftp://ftp.mrunix.net/pub/webalizer/geodb/webalizer-geodb-20170201.tgz: Network is unreachable
=> Attempting to fetch http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/webalizer-geodb-20170201.tgz
fetch: http://distcache.FreeBSD.org/ports-distfiles/webalizer-geodb-20170201.tgz: Not Found
=> Couldn't fetch it - please try to retrieve this
=> port manually into /usr/ports/distfiles/ and try again.
*** Error code 1
